meta.methodology: Go-to-market frameworks for banking AI products based on enterprise sales patterns and financial services market dynamics

phase1_design_partner.name: Design Partner Pilot
phase1_design_partner.objective: Validate product-market fit with 2–3 design partner institutions
activities: Identify 2–3 target institutions with strong executive sponsorship
Co-develop solution with design partner input
Run controlled pilot with defined success metrics
Gather evidence for ROI claims and case studies
Refine product based on real-world feedback
successCriteria: At least 1 design partner willing to provide public reference

phase2_early_market.name: Early Market Expansion
phase2_early_market.objective: Expand to 10–20 customers in target ICP with repeatable sales motion
activities: Establish pricing and packaging for scale
successCriteria: At least 2 customers in each target segment
risks: Sales team hiring ahead of pipeline

phase3_scale.name: Scale & Platform Expansion
phase3_scale.objective: Achieve market leadership position with 50+ customers and platform expansion
activities: Expand to adjacent use cases and personas
Launch self-service and PLG motions where applicable
Invest in thought leadership and analyst relations
Pursue strategic partnerships with core banking vendors

enterprise_direct.name: Enterprise Direct Sales
enterprise_direct.description: Dedicated account executives managing named accounts

partner_led.name: Partner-Led Sales
partner_led.description: System integrators and consulting firms driving opportunities

product_led.name: Product-Led Growth
product_led.description: Self-service trial and expansion through product usage

differentiationAxes.label: Security & Data Privacy
differentiationAxes.description: End-to-end encryption, data residency, SOC 2 / ISO 27001

differentiationAxes.label: Response Latency
differentiationAxes.description: Real-time inference performance under banking SLA requirements

differentiationAxes.label: AI Capability Depth
differentiationAxes.description: Model accuracy, fine-tuning support, multi-modal capabilities

differentiationAxes.label: Data Integration
differentiationAxes.description: Native connectors to core banking, data warehouses, and third-party systems

differentiationAxes.label: Deployment Flexibility
differentiationAxes.description: Cloud, hybrid, on-premise, and air-gapped deployment options

differentiationAxes.label: AI Explainability
differentiationAxes.description: Model interpretability, decision audit trails, and regulatory documentation

differentiationAxes.label: Regulatory Compliance
differentiationAxes.description: Pre-built compliance frameworks, regulatory mappings, and audit support

differentiationAxes.label: Scalability
differentiationAxes.description: Ability to handle banking-scale transaction volumes and concurrent users
